entries.source: Use Service in any manner that could disable, overburden, damage, or impair Service or interfere with any other party’s use of Service, including their ability to engage in real time activities through Service. Use any robot, spider, or other automatic device, process, or means to access Service for any purpose, including monitoring or copying any of the material on Service. Use any manual process to monitor or copy any of the material on Service or for any other unauthorized purpose without our prior written consent. Use any device, software, or routine that interferes with the proper working of Service. Introduce any viruses, trojan horses, worms, logic bombs, or other material which is malicious or technologically harmful. Attempt to gain unauthorized access to, interfere with, damage, or disrupt any parts of Service, the server on which Service is stored, or any server, computer, or database connected to Service. Attack Service via a denial-of-service attack or a distributed denial-of-service attack. Take any action that may damage or falsify Company rating. Otherwise attempt to interfere with the proper working of Service.
entries.value: Bruk Tjeneste in any manner som could disable, overburden, damage, eller impair Tjeneste eller interfere med any other party’s bruk of Tjeneste, including deres ability å engage in ekte tid activities gjennom Tjeneste. Bruk any robot, spider, eller other automatic device, process, eller betyr å access Tjeneste for any purpose, including monitoring eller kopiering any of materiale on Tjeneste. Bruk any manual process å moniteller eller kopier any of materiale on Tjeneste eller for any other unauthorized purpose uten vår prieller skrevet consent. Bruk any device, software, eller rutine som interferes med proper fungerende of Tjeneste. Introduce any viruses, trojan horses, worms, logic bombs, eller other materiale hvilken er malicious eller technologically harmful. Attempt å gain unauthorized access to, interfere with, damage, eller disrupt any parts of Tjeneste, server on hvilken Tjeneste er stored, eller any server, computer, eller database koblet å Tjeneste. Attack Tjeneste via en denial-of-tjeneste attack eller en distributed denial-of-tjeneste attack. Take any action som may damage eller falsify Selskap rating. Otherwise forsøk å interfere med proper fungerende of Tjeneste.

entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Bruk disse prompter in Sokratisk undervisning:

entries.source: Use this compact format: Brief read: one sentence. Map update: concise Claim, Assumption, Gap, or Correction bullets as relevant. Next question: exactly one question. For the first reply, use Target, Contract, and First question.
entries.value: Bruk denne compact format: Brief read: ett sentence. Kartlegg oppdater: concise Påstand, Assumption, Gap, eller Correction bullets as relevant. Next spørsmål: akkurat ett spørsmål. Feller første reply, bruk Target, Contract, og First spørsmål.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Bruk denne for skole, partner, CSR, og education access references.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Bruk denne loop:

entries.source: Use this mode inside a study workflow.
entries.value: Bruk denne modus inni en study arbeidsflyt.

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Bruk denne rule: etter any KI explanation, close loop med output fra din own mind. Skriv idea back. Solve en fresh version. Lag en flashcard. Lær bort det å en imaginary younger student. Be om en quiz. mer økt asks du å produsere, mindre likely du er å fool deg selv.

entries.source: Viva Practice AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Muntlig eksamensøving KI-læringsmodus er en fokusert måte å bruke KI til læring på i stedet for passiv svarinnsamling. Modusen er bygget rundt en bestemt jobb: Øv på viva, muntlige eksamener, prosjektforsvar og raske oppfølgingsspørsmål med rolig tilbakemelding.

entries.source: We at inspir ensure our firm commitment to our users’ privacy and protecting their priceless information. This is intended to help users understand how we collect, use, disclose and protect the information Effective date: 2022-09-01
entries.value: We at inspir ensure vår firm commitment å vår brukere’ personvern og protecting deres priceless informasjon. This er ment å hjelp brukere forstå hvordan vi collect, use, disclose og protect informasjon Effective date: 2022-09-01

entries.source: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you
entries.value: We collect several ulike types of informasjon for various purposes å provide og forbedre vår Tjeneste å du

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: We honeller Do Not Speller signals og ikke track, plant cookies, eller bruk advertising når en Do Not Speller browser mechanism er in place. Do Not Speller er en preference du kan set in din web browser å inform websites som du ikke vil ha å be tracked. Du kan enable eller disable Do Not Speller by visiting Preferences eller Innstillinger side of din web browser. If du er under 18 years of age, reside in California, og have en registered konto med en Tjeneste, du have riktig å request removal of unwanted data som du publicly post on Tjenestes. Å request removal of such data, please contact oss ved å bruke contact informasjon provided below, og inkluder email adresse associated med din konto og en erklæring som du reside in California. We vil lag sure data er ikke publicly displayed on Tjenestes, but please be aware som data may ikke be completely eller comprehensively removed fra all vår systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
